suppress.notes: CVE-2020-29582 was resolved in Kotlin 1.4.21. The scanned Maven component is kotlin-stdlib 1.9.25. The NVD CPE range currently over-matches this later fixed version. This correction is limited to one package and one CVE and expires for mandatory review.

CVE-2026-42582 applies to io.netty:netty-codec-http3 versions 4.2.0.Final through 4.2.12.Final. Dependency-Check associated the generic Netty CPE with io.netty:netty-transport 4.1.135.Final, which is a different module and branch. The correction is limited to the exact package and CVE and expires for mandatory review.
